title: Steamed Shandong Congee Bowl with Polish Kabanos
description: A traditional Chinese congee dish with the added crunch of Polish kabanos and a touch of nutty flavor.

ingredients.name: Polish Kabanos
ingredients.notes: thinly sliced and served on top

ingredients.name: Steamed Vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as bok choy or Chinese broccoli

instructions: Cook the Shandong Congee according to package instructions.
Heat the Sesame Oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the Polish Kabanos slices and cook until crispy.
Serve the congee in a bowl, topped with steamed vegetables and crispy kabanos.
Sprinkle with Polish Rye Bread Crumbs if desired.
